prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "1A. Risk Factors" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 1A's text:
- If the "Item 1B" heading is visible on this page, Item 1A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 1A runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 1A at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
anticipated benefits of the WBD transaction.

The WBD transaction may cause our financial results to differ from expectations, we may not achieve the anticipated benefits of the WBD
transaction, and the WBD transaction may disrupt our current plans or operations.

The success of the WBD transaction will depend, in part, on our ability to successfully integrate the acquired businesses and realize the
anticipated benefits, including synergies. Difficulties in integrating the acquired businesses may result in the failure to realize anticipated synergies in
the expected timeframes, in operational challenges, and in the diversion of management’s attention from ongoing business opportunities, challenges
and risks, as well as in unforeseen expenses associated with the WBD transaction, which may have an adverse impact on our financial results.
